name: The Club
description: All Club cards are debuffed

name: The Goad
description: All Spade cards are debuffed

name: The Head
description: All Heart cards are debuffed

name: The Window
description: All Diamond cards are debuffed

name: The Hook
description: Discards 2 random cards held in hand after every played hand

name: The Pillar
description: Cards played previously this Ante are debuffed

name: The Psychic
description: Must play exactly 5 cards in each hand

name: The Manacle
description: -1 hand size for the round

name: The Arm
description: Decreases level of the played poker hand

name: The Fish
description: Cards drawn after each hand are drawn face down

name: The Flint
description: Base chips and mult are halved

name: The House
description: First hand is drawn face down

name: The Mark
description: Face cards are drawn face down

name: The Mouth
description: Only one hand type can be played this round

name: The Needle
description: Only one hand may be played

name: The Wall
description: Extra large blind score requirement

name: The Water
description: Start the round with zero discards

name: The Wheel
description: 1 in 7 cards are drawn face down

name: The Eye
description: You cannot play the same hand type twice

name: The Tooth
description: Lose 1 for every card played

name: The Plant
description: All face cards are debuffed

name: The Serpent
description: After playing or discarding always draw three cards

name: The Ox
description: Playing your most played hand this run sets money to 0

name: The Amber Acorn
description: Flips and shuffles all Jokers

name: The Verdant Leaf
description: All cards are debuffed until one Joker is sold

name: The Violet Vessel
description: Extremely large blind score requirement

name: The Crimson Heart
description: One random Joker is disabled every hand

name: The Cerulean Bell
description: Forces one card to always be selected
